tasks.subject: Task 0: Scaffold @livefolio/fred-mcp workspace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert the repo to a workspace and stand up the mcp/ package with a green toolchain (configs + placeholder entrypoint).

**Files:** package.json (root, add workspaces:[mcp]); mcp/package.json; mcp/tsconfig.json (paths:{} baseUrl:.); mcp/tsup.config.ts; mcp/vitest.config.ts; mcp/README.md; mcp/src/index.ts (placeholder).

**Verify:** npm install && npm run build -w @livefolio/fred && npm run build -w @livefolio/fred-mcp && head -1 mcp/dist/index.js && npm run lint -w @livefolio/fred-mcp. Fallback if @livefolio/fred won't resolve: set mcp dep to "@livefolio/fred": "file:..".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "mcp/package.json", "mcp/tsconfig.json", "mcp/tsup.config.ts", "mcp/vitest.config.ts", "mcp/README.md", "mcp/src/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm install && npm run build -w @livefolio/fred && npm run build -w @livefolio/fred-mcp && head -1 mcp/dist/index.js && npm run lint -w @livefolio/fred-mcp", "acceptanceCriteria": ["root package.json has workspaces:[mcp]", "npm install links @livefolio/fred into mcp", "build emits dist/index.js with shebang", "lint passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Pure output shapers (format.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert degenerate Bar[] into { series_id, from, to, count, bars:[{t,o,h,l,c,v}] } + one-line summary. Pure, no I/O.

**Files:** mcp/src/format.ts; mcp/src/format.test.ts.

**Verify:** (cd mcp && npx vitest run src/format.test.ts) -> 4 tests PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp/src/format.ts", "mcp/src/format.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mcp && npx vitest run src/format.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["barsToOutput maps to {t,o,h,l,c,v} with date-only t and count", "observationsSummary renders non-empty and empty-range variants"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: get_observations tool handler (tools/observations.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** zod schemas + makeGetObservationsHandler(deps): validate input, build inclusive->half-open DateRange (to end = caller to +1 day), call injected fetcher, shape via format.ts, map throws to tool errors (never throws across protocol).

**Files:** mcp/src/tools/observations.ts; mcp/src/tools/observations.test.ts.

**Verify:** (cd mcp && npx vitest run src/tools/observations.test.ts) -> 8 tests PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp/src/tools/observations.ts", "mcp/src/tools/observations.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mcp && npx vitest run src/tools/observations.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exports schemas + FetchObservations + makeGetObservationsHandler", "success returns structuredContent+summary", "inclusive to becomes half-open +1day", "validation errors skip fetcher", "fetcher throw -> tool error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Server assembly + in-memory integration (server.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** createServer({apiKey, fetchObservations?}) -> McpServer registering get_observations (read-only annotations + outputSchema), defaulting fetcher to fetchFredObservations. Verify end-to-end over InMemoryTransport.

**Files:** mcp/src/server.ts; mcp/src/server.test.ts.

**Verify:** npm run build -w @livefolio/fred && (cd mcp && npx vitest run src/server.test.ts) -> 3 tests PASS (adapter must be built first). Full suite (cd mcp && npx vitest run) -> 15; lint.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp/src/server.ts", "mcp/src/server.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build -w @livefolio/fred && cd mcp && npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createServer registers one tool defaulting to fetchFredObservations", "listTools shows annotations + outputSchema", "success + adapter-throw-resilience verified in-memory"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Bin entrypoint (index.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real bin: read FRED_API_KEY (fail fast to stderr + non-zero exit if missing), build server, connect StdioServerTransport, install stderr-only crash handlers. stdout reserved for JSON-RPC.

**Files:** mcp/src/index.ts.

**Verify:** npm run build -w @livefolio/fred-mcp; env -u FRED_API_KEY node mcp/dist/index.js 1>/tmp/o.txt 2>/tmp/e.txt; echo exit=$? (expect 1); test ! -s /tmp/o.txt (stdout empty); grep -q FRED_API_KEY /tmp/e.txt. Then lint + full suite (15).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp/src/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build -w @livefolio/fred-mcp && env -u FRED_API_KEY node mcp/dist/index.js 1>/tmp/o.txt 2>/tmp/e.txt; echo exit=$?; test ! -s /tmp/o.txt && grep -q FRED_API_KEY /tmp/e.txt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["missing key -> stderr message + non-zero exit, empty stdout", "build emits shebang dist with no errors"]}
```
